login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
login.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

messages.accountCreated: Account created! Please contact your administrator to enable access.

login.passwordHint: Use 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special symbol.
login.signUpDescription: Enter your details to create a new account
login.title: Welcome Back

validation.checkCredentials: Please check your credentials and try again.
validation.connectionError: The server took too long to respond. Please check your connection and try again.
validation.fetchFailed: Unable to connect to the server. Check your network, firewall, or try disabling browser extensions that might block requests.
validation.invalidLoginCredentials: Wrong email or password. Try again or use Forgot password to reset your password.
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Sign in with your password below, or use Forgot password to reset it.
validation.signUpApiError: We couldn't create your account because the server returned an error. Try again in a moment, or contact your administrator if it persists.

noAccessMessage: Please contact your CastorWorks Administrator to enable your access.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

messages.checkEmail: Check your email for the reset link.
messages.sentDescription: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link.
messages.error: Something went wrong. Try again later.
messages.recoveryEmailNotConfigured: Password reset emails are not configured for this server. Please ask your administrator to configure SMTP in Supabase Auth, or to reset your password for you.
